case_title: ROULA MARY HAWAWINI VS. MAHER FAKHOURI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAWAWINI, ROULA MARY AS TO DEFENDANT FAKHOURI, MAHER JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
